summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Intl Value Factor ETF (IVLU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI World ex USA Enhanced Value index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap developed ex-US equities, selected using fundamental metrics, and weighted by these metrics and market-cap. IVLU was launched on Jun 16, 2015 and is issued by BlackRock.

holdings.infoBox: IVLU is an equity ETF with a total of 368 individual holdings. The top holdings are HSBC Holdings stock at 2.12%, Toyota Motor at 1.83%, BNP Paribas at 1.77%, Banco Santander at 1.72%, and British American Tobacco p.l.c. at 1.72%.
